evals.prompt: Create a simple Python script that reads data from 'sales.csv' and prints the total. Run it.
evals.expected_output: The script will fail because sales.csv doesn't exist. Claude should auto-log the error to .learnings/ERRORS.md and mention it to the user.
expectations: An entry was created in .learnings/ERRORS.md with an ERR- prefix
The error entry captures the actual error message from the failed command
Claude mentioned logging the error to the user (e.g., 'Logged to ERRORS.md')
The entry includes a root cause or fix field

evals.prompt: I need a script that joins file paths. Use os.path.join to build the path from these parts: 'src', 'components', 'Button.tsx'. Actually wait — don't use os.path, this project uses pathlib everywhere. Use Path instead.
evals.expected_output: Claude should log the correction to LEARNINGS.md, auto-promote the pathlib convention to project CLAUDE.md, and note both actions to the user.
expectations: An entry was created in .learnings/LEARNINGS.md with a LRN- prefix
The learning captures the pathlib vs os.path correction
The pathlib convention was promoted to the project CLAUDE.md
An entry was created in .learnings/CHANGELOG.md with a PROMO- prefix
Claude mentioned both the logging and promotion to the user

evals.prompt: Start a Flask dev server on port 5000 for me. Oh wait, I keep telling you — port 5000 doesn't work on my Mac because of AirPlay. Use 8888.
evals.expected_output: Claude should log the correction and promote it to user CLAUDE.md (~/.claude/CLAUDE.md), not project CLAUDE.md, since it's a cross-project macOS issue.
expectations: An entry was created in .learnings/LEARNINGS.md about the port 5000 issue
The port 5000/AirPlay insight was promoted to user CLAUDE.md (~/.claude/CLAUDE.md), not project CLAUDE.md
An entry was created in .learnings/CHANGELOG.md with a PROMO- prefix referencing user CLAUDE.md
Claude mentioned the promotion to the user

evals.prompt: Write a quick bash script to compress all .log files in /tmp/logs. Run it.
evals.expected_output: The command will fail (directory doesn't exist). Claude should log to ERRORS.md, mention it, and the changelog should NOT have an entry (errors don't get promoted unless they reveal a broader pattern).
expectations: An entry was created in .learnings/ERRORS.md about the missing directory
Claude mentioned logging the error to the user
.learnings/CHANGELOG.md was NOT created or has no PROMO- entry for this error
No promotion to any CLAUDE.md occurred for this one-off error
